ticket.subject: Refund request for headphones
ticket.body: Hi, I bought a pair of headphones last month but they stopped working after a week. Order number is ORD-1001. I'd like a full refund please.

ticket.subject: Coffee maker stopped working
ticket.body: My BrewMaster coffee maker (ORD-1003) stopped heating water about 2 weeks ago. It's clearly a defect. I want a replacement or refund.

customer.name: David Park

ticket.subject: Return request
ticket.body: Hi team, I'd like to return the two bluetooth speakers I ordered back in December (ORD-1005). I know it might be past the return window but I've been traveling. Can you help?

customer.name: Emma Collins
